_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "clients" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "balance" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "products" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "product_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NOT NULL, "price" TEXT NOT NULL, "cost" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outbox" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "mutation_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "idempotency_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "next_attempt_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "last_error" TEXT NULL, "last_status_code" INTEGER NULL, "field_errors_json" TEXT NULL, "requires_password" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("requires_password" IN (0, 1)), "batch_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "id_remap" ("entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "real_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type", "temp_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sync_state_rows" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_updated_id" TEXT NULL, "last_full_sync_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_delta_sync_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "entity_type"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "statics" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "fetched_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drafts" ("entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type", "entity_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nav_state" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "current_route" TEXT NULL, "selected_company_id" TEXT NULL, "locale" TEXT NULL, "theme_mode" TEXT NULL, "light_variant" TEXT NULL, "dark_variant" TEXT NULL, "filters_json" TEXT NULL, "sidebar_collapsed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("sidebar_collapsed" IN (0, 1)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "companies" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NULL, "logo_url" TEXT NULL, "settings" TEXT NOT NULL, "permissions" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "token" TEXT NOT NULL, "custom_fields" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "size_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "industry_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "legal_entity_id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_admin" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_admin" IN (0, 1)), "is_owner" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_owner" IN (0, 1)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "accounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "plan" TEXT NOT NULL, "num_trial_days" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_hosted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_hosted" IN (0, 1)), "default_company_id" TEXT NULL, "features_json" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "documents" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_path" TEXT NULL, "server_url" TEXT NULL, "mime_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "size" INTEGER NOT NULL, "upload_state" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_settings" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "table_columns_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "extra_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dashboard_cache" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "filter_hash" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "fetched_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "kind", "filter_hash"));
